---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for IDEViewer
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Use Case

Who benefits from this and how? (e.g., "As a security team lead, I need X so that Y.")

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
